name: Winchester Rural East

locations.name: Winchester
locations.description: The Police Office is situated within the Fire Station on Pound Hill in Alresford. The Office is not open to the public.
locations.address:
Alresford Neighbourhood Police Office,
Pound Hill,
Alresford

description: Winchester Rural East includes the following Parishes; New Alresford, Old Alresford, Bishops Sutton, Bighton, Bramdean and Hinton Ampner, Kilmeston, Beauworth, Cheriton, Tichborne, Itchen Stoke and Ovington, Itchen Valley and Northington.
